positive: A stylized and symmetrical central composition featuring a whimsical, retro-futuristic astronaut floating among cosmic elements. The astronaut should be rendered in a bold, clean silhouette style, using vibrant primary colors (cyan, magenta, canary yellow) contrasted against a deep indigo/black space background. Surrounding elements include stylized constellations, geometric nebula shapes, and crystalline space flora. The style should evoke screen-printed pop art mixed with celestial folklore, utilizing bold linework and flat blocks of color for maximum print contrast and visibility on fabric. Perfect for a central, impactful apparel design.
negative: blur, watermark, text, logo, signature, cartoonish, grainy, noisy, ugly, bad anatomy, deformed, messy, low resolution, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, out of frame
